forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 52. West wind around 10 mph.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny. High near 62, with temperatures falling to around 58 in the afternoon. West northwest wind 10 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

weather_report:
As night envelops downtown San Francisco, a calm stillness settles in; the sky dons a partially veiled cloak, with clouds drifting lazily overhead. The temperature nuzzles down to about 52 degrees, a gentle reminder of the crispness that characterizes these evening hours. A soft west wind, whispering at around 10 miles per hour, lends a refreshing touch, urging you to seek comfort in layers this late into the evening.

Emerging from this tranquil night, Wednesday promises to be a delightful day filled with sunshine and moderate breezes. As the sun rises, it casts a warm glow, enveloping the city in a gentle embrace of clarity—a welcome relief from the fog that often lingers. With a high expected near 62 degrees, the air will cool slightly in the afternoon, dropping to around 58 as the west-northwest wind picks up at 10 to 17 miles per hour, carrying with it occasional spirited gusts. Dressed in light layers or a cozy sweater, you’ll find comfort as you navigate the day, perhaps taking a stroll to enjoy one of the city’s many parks or immersing yourself in the culture of the local art galleries. While the weather looks promising, it wouldn’t hurt to keep a light jacket at hand for that playful breeze. Today is a beckoning canvas for simple pleasures, waiting for you to partake in its charms.
